details.test: Task 1: Vulnerability assessment quote under $15k with <=72h response/delivery
Task 2: Schedule 60-minute virtual cyber risk consultation for financial services
Task 3: Incident response retainer plan under $5k with 20+ remote and 4+ on-site hours
Task 4: Enroll 10 employees in phishing-focused security awareness training under $400/seat
Task 5: Bookmark two healthcare case studies with strong breach reduction and short duration
Task 6: Subscribe to Executive Risk Briefing monthly with cloud security, ransomware, regulatory compliance topics
Task 7: ISO 27001 compliance audit proposal request under $30k for 200 employees with <8 week timeline
Task 8: Risk calculator for retail org and view top 3 mitigation services
Task 9: Compare three 24/7 monitoring plans and mark highest endpoint coverage as preferred
